fields.name: openToWork
fields.label: Open to Work
fields.instruction: Enable this to show your availability badge.

sections.label: Hero Section
sections.instruction: Use this section to introduce yourself clearly.

fields.name: focus
fields.label: Focus Areas
fields.instruction: List the technologies or areas you specialize in.

fields.name: tagline
fields.label: One Line Tagline
fields.instruction: Write a short sentence that describes what you do.
fields.placeholder: I build fast, clean and scalable web apps

fields.name: description
fields.label: About You
fields.instruction: Write 2 to 3 sentences about yourself and who you help.
fields.placeholder: I am a full stack developer with 2 years of experience building web applications for startups and freelance clients...

fields.name: description
fields.label: What does it do?
fields.placeholder: A web app that lets users create beautiful portfolios by filling a simple form...

fields.name: stack
fields.label: Tech Stack
fields.instruction: Enter a technology and press Enter to add it.

fields.name: githubLink
fields.label: GitHub Repository URL
fields.instruction: Link this to the View Code button.

fields.name: liveLink
fields.label: Live / Deployed URL
fields.instruction: Link this to the Live Demo button.

sections.label: Skills
sections.instruction: Group your skills into categories (e.g., Frontend, Backend, Tools).

fields.name: items
fields.label: Skills
fields.instruction: Enter a skill and press Enter to add it.

sections.label: Contact
sections.instruction: Add the contact details visitors can use to reach you.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email Address
fields.instruction: Use this so visitors can email you directly.
